locale.unknown: unknown locale `{requested}`; expected one of: en_US, zh_CN, ja_JP
locale.not_enabled.none: locale `{requested}` is not enabled in this build and no i18n packs are compiled
locale.not_enabled.available: locale `{requested}` is not enabled in this build; available locales: {available}
cli.json_parse_then_yaml_disabled: failed to parse config as json ({json_error}); yaml requires `--features gateway-config-yaml`
cli.parse_config_failed: failed to parse config as {primary} or {secondary}
cli.import_litellm_failed: failed to import litellm proxy config: {error}
cli.contract_guard_consistency_only_no_b: contract guard: no base provided, validated only consistency checks (openapi/types/cargo)
cli.contract_guard_consistency_only_miss: contract guard: base `{path}` not found, validated only consistency checks (openapi/types/cargo)
cli.contract_guard_base_not_found: base openapi `{path}` not found (use --allow-missing-base if intentional)
audit.hash_chain_mismatch: hash chain mismatch at line {line_no}: prev_hash expected {expected} got {got}
audit.hash_mismatch: hash mismatch at line {line_no}: expected {expected} got {got}
store_bench.no_stores_selected: no stores selected; pass --sqlite and/or --pg and/or --mysql
audit_export.usage:
usage: ditto-audit-export \
  --base-url URL \
  (--admin-token TOKEN | --admin-token-env ENV) \
  --output PATH|- \
  [--format jsonl|csv] [--limit N] [--since-ts-ms MS] [--before-ts-ms MS] \
  [--manifest-output PATH] \
  [--upload DEST] [--upload-manifest DEST] \
  [--s3-object-lock-mode MODE] [--s3-object-lock-retain-until-date RFC3339] [--s3-object-lock-legal-hold-status STATUS]

DEST may be s3://bucket/key, gs://bucket/object, or http(s)://... (PUT).
audit_export.failed_to_read_admin_token: failed to read admin token from env: {error}
llms_txt.summary_missing_file: SUMMARY link points to missing file: {path}
clap.help_command_about: Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)
clap.error.too_few_values: error: {arg} expects at least {min_values} value(s), got {actual_num_values}
clap.error.no_equals: error: {arg} requires `=` between option and value

config_cli.discover.base_url_required: provider base_url is required when --discover-models is resolved outside config_editing
config_cli.discover.anthropic_unimplemen: discover_models for anthropic_messages is not implemented
config_cli.discover.auth_missing: discover_models needs discovery_api_key or auth_keys env var

error_detail.builder.capability_feature_: ditto-core was built without {capability} support for {provider} provider

error_detail.auth.query_param_name_empty: auth query param name must be non-empty

error_detail.auth.token_string_unsupport: {auth_kind} auth cannot be resolved to a token string
